document:
Harbor Light Compute Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 10 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@harborlight.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 3 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: What is the allowed refund window after purchase?
